channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump Nominates Jay Clayton as Director of National Intelligence
item.description: President Donald Trump announced Thursday he is nominating Jay Clayton, the U.S. attorney for the Southern District of New York and former chair of the Securities and Exchange Commission, to lead the Office of the Director of National Intelligence.

item.title: Trump's push for $350 billion 'arsenal of freedom' hits GOP skepticism
item.description: Trump calls on Republicans to pass a third reconciliation bill with $350 billion in defense spending and voter ID legislation, but GOP skepticism is growing.

item.title: Vance's Chief of Staff to Leave by Summer's End
item.description: Jacob Reses, chief of staff to Vice President JD Vance, is leaving the administration by the end of summer, according to NBC News.

item.title: Trump Announces His Official DNI Nominee After Pulte Appointment Was Met With Stiff Opposition
